parents.subject: LU-2800 autoconf: remove bio_endio args test

commit.subject: LU-3467 ofd: use unified handler for OST requests
commit.message:
LU-3467 ofd: use unified handler for OST requests

Switch OST/OFD request processing to the unified request
handle.
